endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/applicationSecurityGroups
endpoints.description: Gets all application security groups in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/applicationSecurityGroups
endpoints.description: Gets all the application security groups in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/applicationSecurityGroups/{applicationSecurityGroupName}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified application security group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLICATIONSECURITYGROUPNAME}} with a real applicationsecuritygroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/applicationSecurityGroups/{applicationSecurityGroupName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates an application security group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLICATIONSECURITYGROUPNAME}} with a real applicationsecuritygroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/applicationSecurityGroups/{applicationSecurityGroupName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified application security group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLICATIONSECURITYGROUPNAME}} with a real applicationsecuritygroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/applicationSecurityGroups/{applicationSecurityGroupName}
endpoints.description: Updates an application security group's tags.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{APPLICATIONSECURITYGROUPNAME}} with a real applicationsecuritygroupname.
